summary: Frontend testing completed for DemoPreview component feature. All 10 requested features verified successfully. The new demo website previews work correctly with tab switching, proper colors, and animations.
passed_tests: 1. DemoPreview component renders correctly in PricingSection with data-testid='demo-preview-section' ✓
2. Three demo tabs visible: Basis €500, Pro €900, Premium €1400 ✓
3. Tab switching works - clicking each tab shows corresponding demo ✓
4. Basis demo shows hondenwandelservice with amber colors (bg-amber, text-amber) ✓
5. Pro demo shows schoonmaakbedrijf with emerald/green colors (bg-emerald, text-emerald) ✓
6. Premium demo shows nagelstudio with rose/pink colors (bg-rose, text-rose) ✓
7. Browser frame shows correct URLs: basispakket.nl, propakket.nl, premiumpakket.nl ✓
8. Animation works when switching between demos (Framer Motion AnimatePresence) ✓
9. 'Populair' badge shows on Pro tab when not selected, hidden when Pro is active ✓
10. Description text below demo updates: Hondenwandelservice, Schoonmaakbedrijf, Nagelstudio ✓
critical_code_review_comments: DemoPreview component well-structured with separate BasisDemo, ProDemo, PremiumDemo sub-components
Proper use of data-testid attributes (demo-preview-section, demo-tab-basic, demo-tab-pro, demo-tab-premium)
Good animation handling with AnimatePresence mode='wait' for smooth transitions
Browser frame mockup provides nice visual context with traffic light buttons and URL bar
Color themes are distinct and appropriate: amber=simple, emerald=professional, rose=luxurious
context_for_next_testing_agent: DemoPreview component testing completed. The component is located in /app/frontend/src/components/DemoPreview.jsx and integrated into PricingSection in LandingPage.jsx at line 586. Uses data-testid attributes for testing: demo-preview-section (main container), demo-tab-basic, demo-tab-pro, demo-tab-premium (tabs). Default selection is Pro (€900). Business names are Basis Pakket, Pro Pakket, Premium Pakket with matching demo URLs.

verified_features.animation: Framer Motion AnimatePresence with fade and slide transitions
